message:
feat(obligation,plan,types): add obligation ledger, plan certificates, cancellation tokens, and cross-cutting improvements

Obligation subsystem:
- Add obligation ledger for tracking outstanding async obligations with
  automatic cleanup on scope exit (ledger.rs)
- Add e-process (event process) module for obligation-aware concurrent
  execution (eprocess.rs)
- Update obligation module exports

Plan subsystem:
- Significantly expand plan module with formal plan validation, step
  dependency resolution, and execution ordering (mod.rs)
- Add plan certificate module for cryptographic attestation of completed
  plan steps (certificate.rs)
- Add plan test fixtures for deterministic testing (fixtures.rs)

Types:
- Add structured cancellation token hierarchy with parent-child
  propagation, cooperative cancellation, and attribution tracking for
  debugging which component initiated cancellation (cancel.rs)
- Update type module exports

Cross-cutting improvements:
- Expand task record with richer lifecycle metadata (record/task.rs)
- Add graceful shutdown signal helpers (signal/graceful.rs)
- Improve barrier synchronization edge cases (sync/barrier.rs)
- Simplify connection pool slot management (sync/pool.rs)
- Fix service trait object safety (service/service.rs)
- Fix NATS messaging import (messaging/nats.rs)
- Adjust priority scheduler parameters (runtime/scheduler/priority.rs)
- Fix spawn_blocking fallback (runtime/spawn_blocking.rs)
- Improve transport stream error handling (transport/stream.rs, tests.rs)
- Fix H1 stream parsing (http/h1/stream.rs)
- Refine consistent hash ring (distributed/consistent_hash.rs)
- Update test utilities (test_utils.rs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
